activities.name: Project Kickoff Meeting
activities.friction: Scheduling conflicts across multiple time zones
activities.resolution: Use async video recordings with live Q&A session
activities.deliverableDetails: Kickoff presentation deck with project charter, timeline, and success criteria
activities.notes: Ensure all key stakeholders are invited at least 2 weeks in advance

activities.name: Gather Requirements
activities.friction: Stakeholders have conflicting priorities and requirements
activities.resolution: Conduct prioritization workshop using MoSCoW method
activities.deliverableDetails: Requirements document with use cases, user stories, and acceptance criteria
activities.notes: Include both functional and non-functional requirements

activities.name: Architecture Design
activities.friction: Technical debt in existing systems limits design options
activities.resolution: Document technical constraints and create phased approach
activities.deliverableDetails: System architecture diagram, API specifications, and data flow diagrams
activities.notes: Ensure scalability requirements are addressed

activities.name: Budget Approval
activities.friction: Budget constraints may limit scope
activities.resolution: Identify MVP scope and optional enhancements
activities.deliverableDetails: Approved budget allocation with cost breakdown by phase
activities.notes: Include contingency buffer of 15-20%

activities.name: Legal & Compliance Review
activities.friction: Regulatory requirements may add complexity
activities.resolution: Engage compliance specialist early in design phase
activities.deliverableDetails: Legal compliance checklist and risk assessment report
activities.notes: Address data privacy, security standards, and industry regulations

activities.name: Planning Approval Gate
activities.friction: Executive may request changes after review
activities.resolution: Schedule pre-gate review 1 week prior to address concerns
activities.notes: Requires sign-off from Executive Sponsor to proceed to execution phase

activities.name: User Interface Design
activities.friction: Design iterations may extend timeline
activities.resolution: Set clear design review milestones with stakeholder signoff
activities.deliverableDetails: High-fidelity mockups, style guide, and design system components
activities.notes: Include responsive design for mobile and tablet

activities.name: Interactive Prototype
activities.friction: User feedback may require significant design changes
activities.resolution: Conduct usability testing with representative users early
activities.deliverableDetails: Clickable prototype with key user flows and interactions
activities.notes: Test with minimum 10 users from target audience

activities.name: Backend Development
activities.friction: Third-party API dependencies may cause delays
activities.resolution: Create mock services for parallel development
activities.deliverableDetails: REST APIs, database schema, authentication system, and business logic modules
activities.notes: Follow coding standards and include inline documentation

activities.name: Frontend Development
activities.friction: Browser compatibility issues across different versions
activities.resolution: Use modern framework with built-in cross-browser support
activities.deliverableDetails: Responsive web application with all core features implemented
activities.notes: Test on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge browsers

activities.name: System Integration
activities.friction: Legacy system integration requires custom adapters
activities.resolution: Build abstraction layer to isolate integration complexity
activities.deliverableDetails: Integrated system with all APIs connected and data flowing between components
activities.notes: Document all integration points and data mappings

activities.name: Environment Setup
activities.friction: Cloud infrastructure provisioning delays
activities.resolution: Use infrastructure-as-code for repeatable deployments
activities.deliverableDetails: Development, staging, and production environments with CI/CD pipelines
activities.notes: Include automated deployment scripts and monitoring setup

activities.name: Security Hardening
activities.friction: Security vulnerabilities discovered in dependencies
activities.resolution: Implement automated security scanning in CI pipeline
activities.deliverableDetails: Security audit report, penetration test results, and remediation plan
activities.notes: Address all critical and high-severity vulnerabilities before launch

activities.name: Development Complete Gate
activities.notes: Technical Lead must certify all development is complete and ready for testing

activities.name: Test Plan Creation
activities.friction: Incomplete requirements make test coverage difficult
activities.resolution: Work with PM to clarify ambiguous requirements
activities.deliverableDetails: Comprehensive test plan with test cases, scenarios, and acceptance criteria
activities.notes: Include functional, performance, security, and usability test cases

activities.name: Test Data Preparation
activities.friction: Production-like data not available for testing
activities.resolution: Generate synthetic data using data generation tools
activities.deliverableDetails: Test database with realistic data covering edge cases and normal scenarios
activities.notes: Ensure data privacy compliance when using production-like data

activities.name: Functional Testing
activities.friction: Defect resolution may delay testing progress
activities.resolution: Prioritize critical defects and test other areas in parallel
activities.deliverableDetails: Test execution report with pass/fail results and defect log
activities.notes: Track test coverage and ensure all critical paths are tested

activities.name: Performance Testing
activities.friction: Performance bottlenecks discovered under load
activities.resolution: Profile application to identify and optimize slow queries
activities.deliverableDetails: Load test results, performance metrics, and optimization recommendations
activities.notes: Test with 2x expected peak load to ensure headroom

activities.name: User Acceptance Testing
activities.friction: End users unavailable for testing sessions
activities.resolution: Schedule UAT windows during planning phase and send calendar invites
activities.deliverableDetails: UAT sign-off document with user feedback and approved change requests
activities.notes: Include key stakeholders and representative end users

activities.name: Regression Testing
activities.friction: New defects introduced while fixing other issues
activities.resolution: Automate regression test suite for faster feedback
activities.deliverableDetails: Regression test results confirming no new defects introduced
activities.notes: Run full regression suite before each release candidate

activities.name: Quality Approval Gate
activities.notes: QA must certify all tests passed and critical defects resolved

activities.name: Staging Deployment
activities.friction: Deployment failures due to environment differences
activities.resolution: Use infrastructure-as-code to ensure environment parity
activities.deliverableDetails: Application deployed to staging with smoke tests passing
activities.notes: Verify all integrations and configurations work in staging

activities.name: User Training
activities.friction: Users resistant to change from existing process
activities.resolution: Highlight benefits and provide hands-on practice sessions
activities.deliverableDetails: Training materials, user guides, video tutorials, and FAQ document
activities.notes: Offer multiple training sessions to accommodate different schedules

activities.name: Operations Runbook
activities.friction: Insufficient documentation for troubleshooting
activities.resolution: Create detailed runbook during development, not after
activities.deliverableDetails: Operations runbook with deployment procedures, monitoring setup, and troubleshooting guides
activities.notes: Include escalation procedures and on-call rotation

activities.name: Launch Readiness Gate
activities.notes: Executive sponsor must approve production release

activities.name: Production Deployment
activities.friction: Production deployment window conflicts with business hours
activities.resolution: Schedule deployment during maintenance window with rollback plan
activities.deliverableDetails: Application live in production with all systems operational
activities.notes: Have rollback plan ready and team on standby for 24 hours post-launch

activities.name: Production Smoke Tests
activities.friction: Production issues discovered after deployment
activities.resolution: Execute comprehensive smoke test checklist immediately after deployment
activities.deliverableDetails: Smoke test results confirming all critical functionality works in production
activities.notes: Test all integrations and critical user paths

activities.name: Monitoring & Alerting Setup
activities.friction: Alert fatigue from too many notifications
activities.resolution: Tune alert thresholds based on baseline metrics
activities.deliverableDetails: Monitoring dashboards and alerting rules configured for key metrics
activities.notes: Monitor error rates, response times, and resource utilization

activities.name: Hypercare Support
activities.friction: High volume of user support requests overwhelms team
activities.resolution: Create knowledge base and FAQ to handle common issues
activities.deliverableDetails: Hypercare support log with issues resolved and known workarounds
activities.notes: Provide enhanced support for first 30 days post-launch

activities.name: Critical Bug Fixes
activities.friction: Bug fixes may introduce new issues
activities.resolution: Follow strict change control process with testing
activities.deliverableDetails: Hotfix releases addressing critical production issues
activities.notes: Prioritize issues impacting business operations or user experience

activities.name: Success Metrics Analysis
activities.friction: Insufficient data to measure success criteria
activities.resolution: Extend measurement period or use proxy metrics
activities.deliverableDetails: Metrics report comparing actual vs. target KPIs with analysis
activities.notes: Include user adoption, performance, and business impact metrics

activities.name: Project Retrospective
activities.friction: Team members may be reluctant to share honest feedback
activities.resolution: Use anonymous feedback tools and focus on learning, not blame
activities.deliverableDetails: Retrospective report with lessons learned and recommendations
activities.notes: Capture what went well, what could improve, and action items

activities.name: Operations Handoff
activities.friction: Operations team unfamiliar with system architecture
activities.resolution: Conduct knowledge transfer sessions and shadow rotations
activities.deliverableDetails: Complete documentation package with architecture, runbooks, and support procedures
activities.notes: Include contact information for escalations during transition period

activities.name: Project Closure Gate
activities.notes: Final approval to officially close project and release resources
